title: YAMHILL COUNTY CRISIS LINE - 211info
text: NEWBERG BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES YAMHILL COUNTY CRISIS LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support for individuals experiencing mental health issues, thoughts of suicide, or other crises through a county crisis line. 2318 E Portland Road Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Walk in: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm (503) 538-8970 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 538-8970 24/7 Crisis Hotline (844) 842-8200 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or walk in for crisis services FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines Mental Health Crisis Lines Suicide Prevention Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - ADULT MENTAL HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEWBERG BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES
